user.title: Add Weathercloud Station
user.description:
Enter the station ID from the Weathercloud URL.

Example: `app.weathercloud.net/d**5726468552**` → Station ID is `5726468552`

data_description.device_id: The numeric ID at the end of the station URL on app.weathercloud.net

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Weathercloud. Check that the station ID is correct and the station is online.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
